creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rakuco
Date: Sun May 19 14:10:30 2013
New Revision: 318525
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318525

Log:
  Add astro/garmindev: Garmin device drivers for QLandkarteGT.
  
  This driver package allows QLandkarteGT to communicate directly with some
  Garmin GPS units.
  
  PR:		ports/177992
  Submitted by:	Christoph Moench-Tegeder <cmt@burggraben.net>

Added:
  head/astro/garmindev/
  head/astro/garmindev/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/astro/garmindev/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/astro/garmindev/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/astro/garmindev/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/astro/Makefile

Modified: head/astro/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/astro/Makefile	Sun May 19 14:06:36 2013	(r318524)
+++ head/astro/Makefile	Sun May 19 14:10:30 2013	(r318525)
@@ -18,6 +18,7 @@
     SUBDIR += ephem
     SUBDIR += fowsr
     SUBDIR += foxtrotgps
+    SUBDIR += garmindev
     SUBDIR += gkrellmoon2
     SUBDIR += glunarclock
     SUBDIR += gmapcatcher

Added: head/astro/garmindev/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/astro/garmindev/Makefile	Sun May 19 14:10:30 2013	(r318525)
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Created by: Christoph Moench-Tegeder <cmt@burggraben.net>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	garmindev
+PORTVERSION=	0.3.4
+CATEGORIES=	astro
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/qlandkartegt/${PORTNAME}/Garmin%20Device%20Driver%20${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAINTAINER=	cmt@burggraben.net
+COMMENT=	Drivers for using Garmin GPS units with QlandkarteGT
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+USES=		cmake
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/astro/garmindev/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/astro/garmindev/distinfo	Sun May 19 14:10:30 2013	(r318525)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (garmindev-0.3.4.tar.gz) = 86c38f65ba1a05c5d5eb076107094cb789db6ffc5d80bfd7bb209d645bcf87d5
+SIZE (garmindev-0.3.4.tar.gz) = 85173

Added: head/astro/garmindev/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/astro/garmindev/pkg-descr	Sun May 19 14:10:30 2013	(r318525)
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+These drivers are for using certain Garmin GPS units with QLandkarteGT.
+Supported devices are:
+  - Etrex Legend series (C, Cx, HCx, ...)
+  - Etrex Summit HC
+  - Etrex Venture Cx, HC
+  - Etrex Vista series (C, Cx, HCx)
+  - Forerunner 305
+  - GPSMap60 series (C, CS, CSx, Cx)
+  - GPSMap76 seriex (CS, CSx, Cx, S)
+  - Quest
+  - Rino 120
+
+WWW: http://www.qlandkarte.org

Added: head/astro/garmindev/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/astro/garmindev/pkg-plist	Sun May 19 14:10:30 2013	(r318525)
@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@

+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexClassic.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexEuro.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexH.so

+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexLegendC.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexLegendCx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexLegendHCx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexSummitHC.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexVentureCx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexVentureHC.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexVista.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexVistaC.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexVistaCx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libEtrexVistaHCx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libForerunner305.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap60.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap60C.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap60CS.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap60CSx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap60Cx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap76.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap76CS.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap76CSx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap76Cx.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libGPSMap76S.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libQuest.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libRino120.so
+lib/qlandkartegt/libgarmin.a
+lib/qlandkartegt/libwhatGarmin.so
+@dirrm lib/qlandkartegt
+@dirrm include/garmin
